definitions: The random or pseudorandom data used to generate a one-time pad (OTP) for encryption.
The secret cryptographic keying material used in a one-time pad system.
examples: The secure storage of OTP key material is paramount.
Generating sufficient OTP key material is a challenge.
Compromise of OTP key material renders the system insecure.
